title: Reacting to account-settings-view closure in item-view

posts.author: michael.le (Michael Le)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am currently working with both the item-view and account-settings-view in monday.com. The account-settings-view allows me to modify certain settings that directly affect the item-view. However, I haven’t found a way to detect when the account-settings-view has been closed, which would enable me to refresh the item-view automatically with the updated settings.

Is there an available method or workaround that would allow me to trigger a refresh or response in the item-view when the account-settings-view has been exited?

Thanks in advance for your assistance!
